mapper.insert: insert into LSMD_T ( LSMD_T_ID, LSMD001, LSMD002, LSMD003, LSMD004, LSMD005, LSMD006, LSMD007, LSMD008, LSMD010, LSMD013, LSMD014, LSMD015, LSMD019, LSMD024, LSMD025, LSMD026, LSMD027, LSMD028, LSMD029, LSMD030, LSMD031, LSMD033, LSMD036, LSMD037, LSMD039, LSMD042, LSMD045, LSMD046, LSMD047,LSMD048,LSMD053, LSMD054, LSMD055, LSMD058, LSMD081, LSMD083, LSMD084, LSMD085, LSMD086, LSMD906, LSMD907, LSMDCRTDT, LSMDCRTID, LSMDENT, LSMDMODDT, LSMDMODID, LSMDOWNDP, LSMDOWNID, LSMDSITE, LSMDSTUS ) values ( #{lsmdTId}, #{lsmd001}, #{lsmd002}, #{lsmd003}, #{lsmd004}, #{lsmd005}, #{lsmd006}, #{lsmd007}, #{lsmd008}, #{lsmd010}, #{lsmd013}, #{lsmd014}, #{lsmd015}, #{lsmd019}, #{lsmd024}, #{lsmd025}, #{lsmd026}, #{lsmd027}, #{lsmd028}, #{lsmd029}, #{lsmd030}, #{lsmd031}, #{lsmd033}, #{lsmd036},#{lsmd037}, #{lsmd039}, #{lsmd042}, #{lsmd045}, #{lsmd046}, #{lsmd047},#{lsmd048}, #{lsmd053}, #{lsmd054}, #{lsmd055}, #{lsmd058}, #{lsmd081}, #{lsmd083}, #{lsmd084}, #{lsmd085}, #{lsmd086}, #{lsmd906}, #{lsmd907}, #{lsmdcrtdt}, #{lsmdcrtid}, #{lsmdent}, #{lsmdmoddt}, #{lsmdmodid}, #{lsmdowndp}, #{lsmdownid}, #{lsmdsite}, #{lsmdstus} )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM inv_barcode_operation WHERE create_by = #{createBy} AND status_code = 0 AND chag_type = 1
mapper.select: SELECT UNIT.UNIT_CODE FROM MO LEFT JOIN ITEM ON ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID = MO.ITEM_ID LEFT JOIN UNIT ON ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID = UNIT.UNIT_ID WHERE MO.DOC_NO = #{jobNo}

select W.WAREHOUSE_CODE as warehouseCode, W.WAREHOUSE_NAME as warehouseName, B.BIN_CODE as binCode FROM ITEM_PLANT IP LEFT JOIN ITEM I ON I.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID = IP.ITEM_ID LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE W ON W.WAREHOUSE_ID = IP.INBOUND_WAREHOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN BIN B ON B.BIN_ID = IP.INBOUND_BIN_ID WHERE ITEM_CODE = #{itemNo}
mapper.insert: insert into LSMD_T ( LSMD_T_ID, LSMD001, LSMD002, LSMD003, LSMD004, LSMD005, LSMD006, LSMD007, LSMD008, LSMD010, LSMD013, LSMD014, LSMD015, LSMD019, LSMD024, LSMD025, LSMD026, LSMD027, LSMD028, LSMD029, LSMD030, LSMD031, LSMD033, LSMD036, LSMD037, LSMD038,LSMD039, LSMD042, LSMD045, LSMD046, LSMD047, LSMD053, LSMD054, LSMD055, LSMD058, LSMD081,LSMD082, LSMD083, LSMD084, LSMD085, LSMD086, LSMD906, LSMD907, LSMDCRTDT, LSMDCRTID, LSMDENT, LSMDMODDT, LSMDMODID, LSMDOWNDP, LSMDOWNID, LSMDSITE, LSMDSTUS ) values ( #{lsmdTId}, #{lsmd001}, #{lsmd002}, #{lsmd003}, #{lsmd004}, #{lsmd005}, #{lsmd006}, #{lsmd007}, #{lsmd008}, #{lsmd010}, #{lsmd013}, #{lsmd014}, #{lsmd015}, #{lsmd019}, #{lsmd024}, #{lsmd025}, #{lsmd026}, #{lsmd027}, #{lsmd028}, #{lsmd029}, #{lsmd030}, #{lsmd031}, #{lsmd033},#{lsmd036}, #{lsmd037}, #{lsmd038}, #{lsmd039}, #{lsmd042}, #{lsmd045}, #{lsmd046}, #{lsmd047}, #{lsmd053}, #{lsmd054}, #{lsmd055}, #{lsmd058}, #{lsmd081},#{lsmd082}, #{lsmd083}, #{lsmd084}, #{lsmd085}, #{lsmd086}, #{lsmd906}, #{lsmd907}, #{lsmdcrtdt}, #{lsmdcrtid}, #{lsmdent}, #{lsmdmoddt}, #{lsmdmodid}, #{lsmdowndp}, #{lsmdownid}, #{lsmdsite}, #{lsmdstus} )

INSERT INTO bm_barcode_detail (id, barcode, source_no, item_no, item_name, item_spec, qty, warehouse_code, bin_code,create_by,create_date) VALUES(NEWID(),#{subBarcode.barcode},#{subBarcode.sourceNo},#{subBarcode.itemNo},#{subBarcode.itemName},#{subBarcode.itemSpec},#{allocateQty},#{subBarcode.warehouseCode},#{subBarcode.binCode},#{subBarcode.createBy},GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE MO_INSPECTION SET INSPECTION_QTY = #{inspectionQty}, ACCEPTABLE_QTY = #{acceptableQty}, UNQUALIFIED_QTY = #{unqualifiedQty}, DESTROYED_QTY = #{destroyedQty}, DECISION = #{decision}, REINSPECTION = #{reinspection}, RESULT_STATUS = #{resultStatus}, DECISION_DESCRIPTION = #{decisionDescription}, ApproveStatus = 'Y' WHERE DOC_NO = #{checkDocNo};

UPDATE MO_INSPECTION_D SET INSPECTION_QTY = #{inspectionQty}, INSPECTION_AC = #{inspectionAc}, INSPECTION_RE = #{inspectionRe}, INSPECTION_QQ = #{defectiveQty}, DECISION = #{decision}, DEFECTIVE_REASONS_ID = #{defectReasonUuid}, IMPACT_RESULT = #{impactResult}, STANDARD_VALUE = #{standardValue}, STANDARD_MAX = #{standardMax}, STANDARD_MIN = #{standardMin}, QC_MAX = #{qcMax}, QC_MIN = #{qcMin}, REMARK = #{remark} WHERE MO_INSPECTION_ID = #{uuid}

UPDATE MO_RECEIPT_REQUISTION_D SET QUALIFIED_BUSINESS_QTY =#{acceptableQty}, UNQUALIFIED_BUSINESS_QTY =#{unqualifiedQty}, IN_DESTROYED_BUSINESS_QTY =#{destroyedQty}, INSPECTION_STATUS ='4', INSPECTED_QTY=#{inspectionQty} WHERE MO_RECEIPT_REQUISTION_D.MO_RECEIPT_REQUISTION_D_ID IN ( SELECT C.MO_RECEIPT_REQUISTION_D_ID FROM MO_INSPECTION AS A LEFT JOIN MO_INSPECTION_D AS B ON B.MO_INSPECTION_D_ID = A.MO_INSPECTION_ID LEFT JOIN MO_RECEIPT_REQUISTION_D AS C ON C.MO_RECEIPT_REQUISTION_D_ID = A.SOURCE_ID WHERE A.DOC_NO = #{checkDocNo})
UPDATE picking_summary SET match_qty = #{qty}, barcode = '', currect_num = currect_num - #{nowQty} WHERE id = #{id} AND create_by = #{createBy}
UPDATE bm_barcode_detail SET qty = qty - #{allocateQty} WHERE barcode = #{barcode}
UPDATE A SET A.LOT_ID = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000' FROM ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D A LEFT JOIN ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ B ON A.ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_ID = B.ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_ID WHERE B.DOC_NO = #{docNo}
UPDATE picking_summary SET match_qty = #{qty}, barcode = #{barCode}, currect_num = currect_num + #{nowQty} WHERE id = #{id} AND create_by = #{createBy}
UPDATE picking_summary SET currect_num = '0' WHERE create_by = #{createBy}
UPDATE bm_barcode_detail SET lot_att30 = '5' WHERE barcode = #{barcode}
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT top 50 MO.DOC_NO AS DOC_NO, CAST(MO.DOC_DATE AS NVARCHAR(10)) AS DOC_DATE, ITEM.ITEM_CODE AS ITEM_NO, MO.ITEM_DESCRIPTION AS ITEM_NAME, ISNULL(ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME, N' ') AS DEPARTMENT_NAME FROM MO INNER JOIN PLANT AS PLANT ON MO.Owner_Org_ROid = PLANT.PLANT_ID INNER JOIN MO_D ON MO.MO_ID = MO_D.MO_ID INNER JOIN ITEM ON MO.ITEM_ID = ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID INNER JOIN ITEM AS LOW_ITEM ON MO_D.ITEM_ID = LOW_ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ADMIN_UNIT AS ADMIN_UNIT ON MO.Owner_Dept = ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_ID INNER JOIN ITEM_PLANT ON ITEM_PLANT.ITEM_ID = MO_D.ITEM_ID AND ITEM_PLANT.Owner_Org_ROid = MO.Owner_Org_ROid LEFT JOIN OPERATION ON OPERATION.OPERATION_ID = MO_D.OPERATION_ID WHERE PLANT.PLANT_CODE = '1' AND MO.ApproveStatus = N'Y' AND MO.STATUS NOT IN (N'Y', N'y') AND MO_D.REQU_INCLUDE_MULT_QTY - MO_D.ISSUED_QTY > 0 AND MO_D.ITEM_TYPE <> '4' AND ITEM_PLANT.ISSUE_TYPE = N'0'
and MO.DOC_NO like concat('%',#{docNo},'%')
and ITEM.ITEM_CODE like concat('%',#{barcode},'%')
and ITEM.ITEM_CODE like concat('%',#{itemCode},'%')
and MO_D.ITEM_ID like concat('%',#{lowItemCode},'%')
and ISNULL(ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME, N' ') like concat('%',#{departmentName},'%')
and CAST(MO.DOC_DATE AS NVARCHAR(10)) >= #{startDate}
and CAST(MO.DOC_DATE AS NVARCHAR(10)) <= #{endDate}
order by DOC_DATE desc, DOC_NO ASC

SELECT DISTINCT MO.DOC_NO AS DOC_NO, CAST(MO.DOC_DATE AS NVARCHAR(10)) AS DOC_DATE, ITEM.ITEM_CODE AS ITEM_CODE, MO.ITEM_DESCRIPTION AS ITEM_NAME, ISNULL(ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME, N' ') AS DEPARTMENT_NAME FROM MO INNER JOIN PLANT AS PLANT ON MO.Owner_Org_ROid = PLANT.PLANT_ID INNER JOIN MO_D ON MO.MO_ID = MO_D.MO_ID INNER JOIN ITEM ON MO.ITEM_ID = ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID INNER JOIN ITEM AS LOW_ITEM ON MO_D.ITEM_ID = LOW_ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ADMIN_UNIT AS ADMIN_UNIT ON MO.Owner_Dept = ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_ID INNER JOIN ITEM_PLANT ON ITEM_PLANT.ITEM_ID = MO_D.ITEM_ID AND ITEM_PLANT.Owner_Org_ROid = MO.Owner_Org_ROid LEFT JOIN OPERATION ON OPERATION.OPERATION_ID = MO_D.OPERATION_ID WHERE PLANT.PLANT_CODE = '1' AND MO.ApproveStatus = N'Y' AND MO.STATUS NOT IN (N'Y', N'y') AND MO_D.REQU_INCLUDE_MULT_QTY - MO_D.ISSUED_QTY > 0 AND MO_D.ITEM_TYPE <> '4' AND ITEM_PLANT.ISSUE_TYPE = N'0' and MO.DOC_NO = #{docNo}

SELECT MO.DOC_NO AS DOC_NO, MO_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION AS ITEM_NAME, MO_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION AS ITEM_SPEC, LOW_ITEM.ITEM_CODE AS ITEM_CODE, UNIT.UNIT_CODE AS UNIT_NO, sum(MO_D.REQU_INCLUDE_MULT_QTY) AS SOURCE_DOC_QTY, sum((MO_D.REQU_INCLUDE_MULT_QTY - MO_D.ISSUED_QTY)) AS APPLY_QTY, ISNULL(ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.TOTAL_INVENTORY_QTY, 0) AS STOCKQTY, ISNULL(ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.WAREHOUSE_CODE, '') AS warehouse_code, ISNULL(ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.WAREHOUSE_NAME, '') AS warehouse_name, ISNULL(ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BIN_CODE, '') AS BIN_code, 0 AS MATCH_QTY FROM MO INNER JOIN PLANT ON MO.Owner_Org_ROid = PLANT.PLANT_ID INNER JOIN MO_D ON MO.MO_ID = MO_D.MO_ID INNER JOIN ITEM ON MO.ITEM_ID = ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID INNER JOIN ITEM AS LOW_ITEM ON LOW_ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID = MO_D.ITEM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ITEM_FEATURE ON MO_D.ITEM_FEATURE_ID = ITEM_FEATURE.ITEM_FEATURE_ID INNER JOIN UNIT AS UNIT ON LOW_ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID = UNIT.UNIT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_ID AS ITEM_ID, WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID AS WAREHOUSE_ID, WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_CODE AS WAREHOUSE_CODE, WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_NAME AS WAREHOUSE_NAME, ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_FEATURE_ID AS ITEM_FEATURE_ID, ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.Owner_Org_ROid AS Owner_Org_ROid, ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BIN_ID AS BIN_ID, BIN.BIN_CODE AS BIN_CODE, SUM(ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.INVENTORY_QTY) AS TOTAL_INVENTORY_QTY , SUM(ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.SECOND_QTY) AS TOTAL_SECOND_QTY FROM ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN INNER JOIN WAREHOUSE ON ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.WAREHOUSE_ID = WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN BIN ON BIN.BIN_ID = ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BIN_ID GROUP BY ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_ID, WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID, ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_FEATURE_ID, ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.Owner_Org_ROid, ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BIN_ID, WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_CODE, BIN.BIN_CODE, WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_NAME) AS ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN ON ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_ID = MO_D.ITEM_ID AND ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_FEATURE_ID = MO_D.ITEM_FEATURE_ID AND ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.WAREHOUSE_ID = MO_D.WAREHOUSE_ID AND ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.Owner_Org_ROid = MO.Owner_Org_ROid AND ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.WAREHOUSE_ID = MO_D.WAREHOUSE_ID AND ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BIN_ID = MO_D.BIN_ID INNER JOIN ITEM_PLANT ON ITEM_PLANT.ITEM_ID = MO_D.ITEM_ID AND ITEM_PLANT.Owner_Org_ROid = MO.Owner_Org_ROid LEFT JOIN UNIT AS UNIT_02 ON LOW_ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID = UNIT_02.UNIT_ID LEFT JOIN dbo.UNIT AS UNIT_04 ON LOW_ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID = UNIT_04.UNIT_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM_LOT AS ITEM_LOT ON ITEM_LOT.ITEM_LOT_ID = MO_D.ITEM_LOT_ID LEFT JOIN OPERATION ON OPERATION.OPERATION_ID = MO_D.OPERATION_ID WHERE PLANT.PLANT_CODE = '1' and MO.DOC_NO = #{docNo} AND MO.ApproveStatus = N'Y' AND ITEM_PLANT.ISSUE_TYPE = N'0' AND MO.STATUS NOT IN (N'Y', N'y') AND MO_D.REQU_INCLUDE_MULT_QTY > MO_D.ISSUED_QTY AND MO_D.ITEM_TYPE <> '4'
group by MO.DOC_NO, MO.ITEM_DESCRIPTION, MO.ITEM_SPECIFICATION, LOW_ITEM.ITEM_CODE, MO_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION , MO_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION, ITEM_FEATURE.ITEM_FEATURE_CODE, UNIT.UNIT_CODE , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.TOTAL_INVENTORY_QTY , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.TOTAL_SECOND_QTY , UNIT.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT , LOW_ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID , UNIT.UNIT_ID , LOW_ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID , LOW_ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.WAREHOUSE_CODE , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BIN_CODE , ITEM_LOT.LOT_CODE, UNIT.DICIMAL_DIGIT , MO.DOC_NO , ITEM.ITEM_CODE , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.WAREHOUSE_NAME

SELECT MO.DOC_NO AS DOC_NO, MO_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION AS ITEM_NAME, MO_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION AS ITEM_SPEC, LOW_ITEM.ITEM_CODE AS ITEM_CODE, UNIT.UNIT_CODE AS UNIT_NO, sum(MO_D.REQU_INCLUDE_MULT_QTY) AS SOURCE_DOC_QTY, sum((MO_D.REQU_INCLUDE_MULT_QTY - MO_D.ISSUED_QTY)) AS APPLY_QTY, ISNULL(ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.TOTAL_INVENTORY_QTY, 0) AS STOCKQTY, ISNULL(ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.WAREHOUSE_CODE, '') AS warehouse_code, ISNULL(ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.WAREHOUSE_NAME, '') AS warehouse_name, ISNULL(ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BIN_CODE, '') AS BIN_code FROM MO INNER JOIN PLANT ON MO.Owner_Org_ROid = PLANT.PLANT_ID INNER JOIN MO_D ON MO.MO_ID = MO_D.MO_ID INNER JOIN ITEM ON MO.ITEM_ID = ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID INNER JOIN ITEM AS LOW_ITEM ON LOW_ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID = MO_D.ITEM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ITEM_FEATURE ON MO_D.ITEM_FEATURE_ID = ITEM_FEATURE.ITEM_FEATURE_ID INNER JOIN UNIT AS UNIT ON LOW_ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID = UNIT.UNIT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_ID AS ITEM_ID, WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID AS WAREHOUSE_ID, WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_CODE AS WAREHOUSE_CODE, WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_NAME AS WAREHOUSE_NAME, ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_FEATURE_ID AS ITEM_FEATURE_ID, ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.Owner_Org_ROid AS Owner_Org_ROid, ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BIN_ID AS BIN_ID, BIN.BIN_CODE AS BIN_CODE, SUM(ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.INVENTORY_QTY) AS TOTAL_INVENTORY_QTY , SUM(ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.SECOND_QTY) AS TOTAL_SECOND_QTY FROM ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN INNER JOIN WAREHOUSE ON ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.WAREHOUSE_ID = WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN BIN ON BIN.BIN_ID = ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BIN_ID GROUP BY ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_ID, WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID, ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_FEATURE_ID, ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.Owner_Org_ROid, ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BIN_ID, WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_CODE, BIN.BIN_CODE, WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_NAME) AS ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN ON ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_ID = MO_D.ITEM_ID AND ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_FEATURE_ID = MO_D.ITEM_FEATURE_ID AND ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.WAREHOUSE_ID = MO_D.WAREHOUSE_ID AND ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.Owner_Org_ROid = MO.Owner_Org_ROid AND ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.WAREHOUSE_ID = MO_D.WAREHOUSE_ID AND ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BIN_ID = MO_D.BIN_ID INNER JOIN ITEM_PLANT ON ITEM_PLANT.ITEM_ID = MO_D.ITEM_ID AND ITEM_PLANT.Owner_Org_ROid = MO.Owner_Org_ROid LEFT JOIN UNIT AS UNIT_02 ON LOW_ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID = UNIT_02.UNIT_ID LEFT JOIN dbo.UNIT AS UNIT_04 ON LOW_ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID = UNIT_04.UNIT_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM_LOT AS ITEM_LOT ON ITEM_LOT.ITEM_LOT_ID = MO_D.ITEM_LOT_ID LEFT JOIN OPERATION ON OPERATION.OPERATION_ID = MO_D.OPERATION_ID WHERE PLANT.PLANT_CODE = '1' and MO.DOC_NO = #{docNo} and LOW_ITEM.ITEM_CODE = #{barcode} AND MO.ApproveStatus = N'Y' AND ITEM_PLANT.ISSUE_TYPE = N'0' AND MO.STATUS NOT IN (N'Y', N'y') AND MO_D.REQU_INCLUDE_MULT_QTY > MO_D.ISSUED_QTY AND MO_D.ITEM_TYPE <> '4'
group by MO.DOC_NO, MO.ITEM_DESCRIPTION, MO.ITEM_SPECIFICATION, LOW_ITEM.ITEM_CODE, MO_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION , MO_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION, ITEM_FEATURE.ITEM_FEATURE_CODE, UNIT.UNIT_CODE , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.TOTAL_INVENTORY_QTY , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.TOTAL_SECOND_QTY , UNIT.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT , LOW_ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID , UNIT.UNIT_ID , LOW_ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID , LOW_ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.WAREHOUSE_CODE , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BIN_CODE , ITEM_LOT.LOT_CODE, UNIT.DICIMAL_DIGIT , MO.DOC_NO , ITEM.ITEM_CODE , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.WAREHOUSE_NAME

SELECT DISTINCT TOP 10 replace(A.DOC_NO,' ','') AS DOC_NO, CAST(A.DOC_DATE AS NVARCHAR(10)) AS DOC_DATE, ISNULL(C.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE, N' ') AS department_No, ISNULL(C.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME, N' ') AS department_Name, ISNULL(D.EMPLOYEE_CODE, N' ') AS employee_No, ISNULL(D.EMPLOYEE_NAME, N' ') AS employee_Name FROM ISSUE_RECEIPT AS A INNER JOIN PLANT ON A.Owner_Org_ROid = PLANT.PLANT_ID LEFT JOIN ADMIN_UNIT AS C ON A.Owner_Dept = C.ADMIN_UNIT_ID LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE AS D ON A.Owner_Emp = D.EMPLOYEE_ID INNER JOIN ISSUE_RECEIPT_D AS B ON A.ISSUE_RECEIPT_ID = B.ISSUE_RECEIPT_ID INNER JOIN ITEM ON B.ITEM_ID = ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID WHERE PLANT.PLANT_CODE = '1' AND A.ApproveStatus = N'N' AND A.CATEGORY = '56' AND B.ISSUE_RECEIPT_QTY > N'0' AND A.DOC_NO like concat('%',#{docNo},'%')
AND A.DOC_DATE = concat(#{docDate},' 00:00:00.0000000')
AND (C.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME LIKE concat('%',#{department},'%') OR C.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE LIKE concat('%',#{department},'%'))
AND (D.EMPLOYEE_CODE LIKE concat('%',#{applyEmployee},'%') OR D.EMPLOYEE_NAME LIKE concat('%',#{applyEmployee},'%'))
ORDER BY DOC_DATE DESC, DOC_NO ASC, department_No, department_Name, employee_No, employee_Name

SELECT DISTINCT TOP 100 replace(ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ.DOC_NO,' ','') AS docNo , CAST(ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ.DOC_DATE AS NVARCHAR(10)) AS docDate , ISNULL(ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE, N' ') AS departmentNo , ISNULL(ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME, N' ') AS departmentName , ISNULL(EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_CODE, N' ') AS employeeNo , ISNULL(EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_NAME, N' ') AS employeeName , ITEM.ITEM_CODE AS itemCode , '' AS stockCode , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION AS itemName , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION AS itemSpec , ISNULL(UNIT.UNIT_CODE, N' ') AS unitNo , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.applyQty AS applyQty , sum(ISNULL(ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.TOTAL_INVENTORY_QTY, 0)) AS stockQty , sum(ISNULL(ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.TOTAL_SECOND_QTY, 0)) AS referenceStockQty , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE, '') AS referenceStockUnitNo , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME, '') AS referenceStockUnitName , 0 AS scanSumQty , '' AS customerNo , '' AS customerName , '' AS supplierNo , '' AS supplierName , ISNULL(WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_CODE, N' ') AS warehouseNo , ISNULL(BIN.BIN_CODE, N' ') AS storageSpacesNo , ISNULL(ITEM_LOT.LOT_CODE, N' ') AS lotNo , UNIT.UNIT_NAME as unitName , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE, '') AS referenceUnitNo , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME, '') AS referenceUnitName , dbo.UNIT_CONVERT(ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.applyQty, ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID, 0) AS referenceQty , '' AS valuationUnitNo , '' AS valuationUnitName , 0 AS valuationQty , UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE AS stockUnitNo , UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME AS stockUnitName , UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT AS stockKeep , dbo.UNIT_CONVERT(ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.applyQty, ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID, 0) AS stockUnitQty , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.sourceDocQty AS sourceDocQty , CASE WHEN dbo.UNIT_CONVERT(ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, 1, ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID, 1) = '0' THEN 1 ELSE dbo.UNIT_CONVERT(ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, 1, ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID, 1) END as rate , ISNULL(UNIT.DICIMAL_DIGIT, 0) as keep ,ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.SequenceNumber as xh ,ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.REMARK as remark FROM ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ AS ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ LEFT OUTER JOIN ADMIN_UNIT AS ADMIN_UNIT ON ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ.Owner_Dept = ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN EMPLOYEE AS EMPLOYEE ON ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ.Owner_Emp = EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_ID INNER JOIN (select ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.ITEM_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.ITEM_FEATURE_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.WAREHOUSE_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.UNIT_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.BIN_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.LOT_ID , SUM(ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.REQUEST_QTY - ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.ISSUE_RECEIPT_QTY) AS applyQty , SUM(ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.REQUEST_QTY) AS sourceDocQty ,ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.SequenceNumber ,ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.REMARK from ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D where ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.[CLOSE] = N'0' group by ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.ITEM_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.ITEM_FEATURE_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.WAREHOUSE_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.UNIT_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.BIN_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.LOT_ID ,ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.SequenceNumber ,ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.REMARK ) AS ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D ON ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ.ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_ID = ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_ID INNER JOIN ITEM AS ITEM ON ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.ITEM_ID = ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ITEM_FEATURE AS ITEM_FEATURE ON ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.ITEM_FEATURE_ID = ITEM_FEATURE.ITEM_FEATURE_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN WAREHOUSE AS WAREHOUSE ON ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.WAREHOUSE_ID = WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID INNER JOIN UNIT AS UNIT ON ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.UNIT_ID = UNIT.UNIT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN BIN ON ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.BIN_ID = BIN.BIN_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ITEM_LOT ON ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.LOT_ID = ITEM_LOT.ITEM_LOT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_FEATURE_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.WAREHOUSE_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BIN_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_LOT_ID , SUM(ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.INVENTORY_QTY) AS TOTAL_INVENTORY_QTY , SUM(ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.SECOND_QTY) AS TOTAL_SECOND_QTY FROM ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN AS ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN INNER JOIN PLANT ON ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.Owner_Org_ROid = PLANT.PLANT_ID INNER JOIN WAREHOUSE ON ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.WAREHOUSE_ID = WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID WHERE ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BO_ID_RTK = 'OTHER' AND ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BO_ID_ROid = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000' AND PLANT.PLANT_CODE = '1' GROUP BY ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_FEATURE_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.WAREHOUSE_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BIN_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_LOT_ID) AS ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN ON ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_ID = ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.ITEM_ID AND ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_FEATURE_ID = ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.ITEM_FEATURE_ID AND (ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.WAREHOUSE_ID = ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.WAREHOUSE_ID OR ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.WAREHOUSE_ID = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000') AND (ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BIN_ID = ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.BIN_ID OR ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.BIN_ID = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000') AND (ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_LOT_ID = ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.LOT_ID or ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.LOT_ID = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000') LEFT JOIN UNIT AS UNIT_02 ON ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID = UNIT_02.UNIT_ID LEFT JOIN dbo.UNIT AS UNIT_04 ON ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID = UNIT_04.UNIT_ID WHERE ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ.DOC_NO like concat('%',#{docNo},'%')
AND (EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_CODE like concat('%',#{applyEmployee},'%') or EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_NAME like concat('%',#{applyEmployee},'%'))
AND (ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE like concat('%',#{department},'%') OR ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME like concat('%',#{department},'%'))
and ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ.DOC_DATE > #{startDate}
and ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ.DOC_DATE < #{endDate}
AND ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ.ApproveStatus = N'Y' GROUP BY ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ.DOC_NO , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ.DOC_DATE , ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE , ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME , EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_CODE , EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_NAME , ITEM.ITEM_CODE , ITEM_FEATURE.ITEM_FEATURE_CODE , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION , UNIT.UNIT_CODE , WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_CODE , BIN.BIN_CODE , ITEM_LOT.LOT_CODE , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.applyQty , UNIT.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT , ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID , UNIT.UNIT_ID , ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID , ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.sourceDocQty , UNIT.DICIMAL_DIGIT ,ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.SequenceNumber ,ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.REMARK
UNION ALL
SELECT replace(ISSUE_RECEIPT.DOC_NO,' ','') AS docNo , CAST(ISSUE_RECEIPT.DOC_DATE AS NVARCHAR(10)) AS docDate , ISNULL(ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE, N' ') AS departmentNo , ISNULL(ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME, N' ') AS departmentName , ISNULL(EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_CODE, N' ') AS employeeNo , ISNULL(EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_NAME, N' ') AS employeeName , ITEM.ITEM_CODE AS itemCode , '' AS stockCode , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION AS itemName , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION AS itemSpec , ISNULL(UNIT.UNIT_CODE, N' ') AS unitNo , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.applyQty AS applyQty , sum(ISNULL(ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.TOTAL_INVENTORY_QTY, 0)) AS stockQty , sum(ISNULL(ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.TOTAL_SECOND_QTY, 0)) AS referenceStockQty , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE, '') AS referenceStockUnitNo , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME, '') AS referenceStockUnitName , 0 AS scanSumQty , '' AS customerNo , '' AS customerName , '' AS supplierNo , '' AS supplierName , ISNULL(WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_CODE, N' ') AS warehouseNo , ISNULL(BIN.BIN_CODE, N' ') AS storageSpacesNo , ISNULL(ITEM_LOT.LOT_CODE, N' ') AS lotNo , UNIT.UNIT_NAME as unitName , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE, '') AS referenceUnitNo , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME, '') AS referenceUnitName , dbo.UNIT_CONVERT(ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.applyQty, ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID, 0) AS referenceQty , '' AS valuationUnitNo , '' AS valuationUnitName , 0 AS valuationQty , UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE AS stockUnitNo , UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME AS stockUnitName , UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT AS stockKeep , dbo.UNIT_CONVERT(ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.applyQty, ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID, 0) AS stockUnitQty , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.sourceDocQty AS sourceDocQty , CASE WHEN dbo.UNIT_CONVERT(ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, 1, ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID, 1) = '0' THEN 1 ELSE dbo.UNIT_CONVERT(ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, 1, ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID, 1) END as rate , ISNULL(UNIT.DICIMAL_DIGIT, 0) as keep ,ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.SequenceNumber AS xh ,ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.REMARK AS remark FROM ISSUE_RECEIPT AS ISSUE_RECEIPT LEFT OUTER JOIN ADMIN_UNIT AS ADMIN_UNIT ON ISSUE_RECEIPT.Owner_Dept = ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN EMPLOYEE AS EMPLOYEE ON ISSUE_RECEIPT.Owner_Emp = EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_ID INNER JOIN (select ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ISSUE_RECEIPT_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_FEATURE_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.WAREHOUSE_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.UNIT_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.BIN_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_LOT_ID , SUM(ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ISSUE_RECEIPT_QTY) AS applyQty , SUM(ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ISSUE_RECEIPT_QTY) AS sourceDocQty ,ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.SequenceNumber ,ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.REMARK from ISSUE_RECEIPT_D group by ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ISSUE_RECEIPT_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_FEATURE_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.WAREHOUSE_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.UNIT_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.BIN_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_LOT_ID ,ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.SequenceNumber ,ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.REMARK ) AS ISSUE_RECEIPT_D ON ISSUE_RECEIPT.ISSUE_RECEIPT_ID = ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ISSUE_RECEIPT_ID INNER JOIN ITEM AS ITEM ON ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_ID = ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN ITEM_FEATURE AS ITEM_FEATURE ON ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_FEATURE_ID = ITEM_FEATURE.ITEM_FEATURE_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN WAREHOUSE AS WAREHOUSE ON ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.WAREHOUSE_ID = WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID INNER JOIN UNIT AS UNIT ON ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.UNIT_ID = UNIT.UNIT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN BIN ON ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.BIN_ID = BIN.BIN_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ITEM_LOT ON ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_LOT_ID = ITEM_LOT.ITEM_LOT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_FEATURE_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.WAREHOUSE_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BIN_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_LOT_ID , SUM(ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.INVENTORY_QTY) AS TOTAL_INVENTORY_QTY , SUM(ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.SECOND_QTY) AS TOTAL_SECOND_QTY FROM ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN AS ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN INNER JOIN PLANT ON ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.Owner_Org_ROid = PLANT.PLANT_ID INNER JOIN WAREHOUSE ON ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.WAREHOUSE_ID = WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID WHERE ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BO_ID_RTK = 'OTHER' AND ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BO_ID_ROid = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000' AND PLANT.PLANT_CODE = '1' GROUP BY ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_FEATURE_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.WAREHOUSE_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BIN_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_LOT_ID) AS ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN ON ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_ID = ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_ID AND ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_FEATURE_ID = ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_FEATURE_ID AND (ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.WAREHOUSE_ID = ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.WAREHOUSE_ID OR ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.WAREHOUSE_ID = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000') AND (ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BIN_ID = ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.BIN_ID OR ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.BIN_ID = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000') AND (ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_LOT_ID = ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_LOT_ID or ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_LOT_ID = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000') LEFT JOIN UNIT AS UNIT_02 ON ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID = UNIT_02.UNIT_ID LEFT JOIN dbo.UNIT AS UNIT_04 ON ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID = UNIT_04.UNIT_ID WHERE ISSUE_RECEIPT.DOC_NO like concat('%',#{docNo},'%')
AND (EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_CODE like concat('%',#{applyEmployee},'%') or EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_NAME like concat('%',#{applyEmployee},'%'))
AND (ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE like concat('%',#{department},'%') OR ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME like concat('%',#{department},'%'))
and ISSUE_RECEIPT.DOC_DATE > #{startDate}
and ISSUE_RECEIPT.DOC_DATE < #{endDate}
AND ISSUE_RECEIPT.ApproveStatus = N'N' GROUP BY ISSUE_RECEIPT.DOC_NO , ISSUE_RECEIPT.DOC_DATE , ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE , ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME , EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_CODE , EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_NAME , ITEM.ITEM_CODE , ITEM_FEATURE.ITEM_FEATURE_CODE , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION , UNIT.UNIT_CODE , WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_CODE , BIN.BIN_CODE , ITEM_LOT.LOT_CODE , UNIT.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT , ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID , UNIT.UNIT_ID , ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID , ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.applyQty , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.sourceDocQty , UNIT.DICIMAL_DIGIT ,ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.SequenceNumber ,ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.REMARK order by docDate DESC, docNo ASC, xh ASC

SELECT DISTINCT A.DOC_NO AS DOC_NO, CAST(A.DOC_DATE AS NVARCHAR(10)) AS DOC_DATE, ISNULL(C.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE, N' ') AS department_No, ISNULL(C.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME, N' ') AS department_Name, ISNULL(D.EMPLOYEE_CODE, N' ') AS employee_No, ISNULL(D.EMPLOYEE_NAME, N' ') AS employee_Name FROM ISSUE_RECEIPT AS A INNER JOIN PLANT ON A.Owner_Org_ROid = PLANT.PLANT_ID LEFT JOIN ADMIN_UNIT AS C ON A.Owner_Dept = C.ADMIN_UNIT_ID LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE AS D ON A.Owner_Emp = D.EMPLOYEE_ID INNER JOIN ISSUE_RECEIPT_D AS B ON A.ISSUE_RECEIPT_ID = B.ISSUE_RECEIPT_ID INNER JOIN ITEM ON B.ITEM_ID = ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID WHERE PLANT.PLANT_CODE = '1' AND A.ApproveStatus = N'N' AND A.CATEGORY = '56' AND B.ISSUE_RECEIPT_QTY > N'0' AND A.DOC_NO like concat('%', #{docNo}, '%')

SELECT ITEM.ITEM_CODE AS item_No , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION AS item_Name , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION AS item_Spec , ISNULL(UNIT.UNIT_CODE, N' ') AS unit_No , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.applyQty AS apply_Qty , sum(ISNULL(ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.TOTAL_INVENTORY_QTY, 0)) AS stock_Qty , ISNULL(WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_CODE, N' ') AS warehouse_No
FROM ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ AS ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ LEFT OUTER JOIN ADMIN_UNIT AS ADMIN_UNIT ON ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ.Owner_Dept = ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN EMPLOYEE AS EMPLOYEE ON ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ.Owner_Emp = EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_ID INNER JOIN (select ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.ITEM_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.ITEM_FEATURE_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.WAREHOUSE_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.UNIT_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.BIN_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.LOT_ID , SUM(ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.REQUEST_QTY - ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.ISSUE_RECEIPT_QTY) AS applyQty , SUM(ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.REQUEST_QTY) AS sourceDocQty from ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D where ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.[CLOSE] = N'0' group by ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.ITEM_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.ITEM_FEATURE_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.WAREHOUSE_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.UNIT_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.BIN_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.LOT_ID) AS ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D ON ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ.ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_ID = ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_ID INNER JOIN ITEM AS ITEM ON ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.ITEM_ID = ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ITEM_FEATURE AS ITEM_FEATURE ON ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.ITEM_FEATURE_ID = ITEM_FEATURE.ITEM_FEATURE_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN WAREHOUSE AS WAREHOUSE ON ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.WAREHOUSE_ID = WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID INNER JOIN UNIT AS UNIT ON ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.UNIT_ID = UNIT.UNIT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN BIN ON ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.BIN_ID = BIN.BIN_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ITEM_LOT ON ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.LOT_ID = ITEM_LOT.ITEM_LOT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_FEATURE_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.WAREHOUSE_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BIN_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_LOT_ID , SUM(ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.INVENTORY_QTY) AS TOTAL_INVENTORY_QTY , SUM(ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.SECOND_QTY) AS TOTAL_SECOND_QTY FROM ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN AS ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN INNER JOIN PLANT ON ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.Owner_Org_ROid = PLANT.PLANT_ID INNER JOIN WAREHOUSE ON ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.WAREHOUSE_ID = WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID WHERE ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BO_ID_RTK = 'OTHER' AND ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BO_ID_ROid = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000' AND PLANT.PLANT_CODE = '1' GROUP BY ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_FEATURE_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.WAREHOUSE_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BIN_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_LOT_ID) AS ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN ON ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_ID = ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.ITEM_ID AND ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_FEATURE_ID = ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.ITEM_FEATURE_ID AND (ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.WAREHOUSE_ID = ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.WAREHOUSE_ID OR ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.WAREHOUSE_ID = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000') AND (ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BIN_ID = ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.BIN_ID OR ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.BIN_ID = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000') AND (ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_LOT_ID = ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.LOT_ID or ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.LOT_ID = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000') LEFT JOIN UNIT AS UNIT_02 ON ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID = UNIT_02.UNIT_ID LEFT JOIN dbo.UNIT AS UNIT_04 ON ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID = UNIT_04.UNIT_ID WHERE ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ.DOC_NO = #{docNo} AND ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ.ApproveStatus = N'Y' GROUP BY ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ.DOC_NO , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ.DOC_DATE , ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE , ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME , EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_CODE , EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_NAME , ITEM.ITEM_CODE , ITEM_FEATURE.ITEM_FEATURE_CODE , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION , UNIT.UNIT_CODE , WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_CODE , BIN.BIN_CODE , ITEM_LOT.LOT_CODE , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.applyQty , UNIT.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT , ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID , UNIT.UNIT_ID , ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID , ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D.sourceDocQty , UNIT.DICIMAL_DIGIT UNION ALL
SELECT ISSUE_RECEIPT.DOC_NO , ITEM.ITEM_CODE AS item_No , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION AS item_Name , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION AS item_Spec , ISNULL(UNIT.UNIT_CODE, N' ') AS unit_No , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.applyQty AS apply_Qty , sum(ISNULL(ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.TOTAL_INVENTORY_QTY, 0)) AS stock_Qty , ISNULL(WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_CODE, N' ') AS warehouse_No FROM ISSUE_RECEIPT AS ISSUE_RECEIPT LEFT OUTER JOIN ADMIN_UNIT AS ADMIN_UNIT ON ISSUE_RECEIPT.Owner_Dept = ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN EMPLOYEE AS EMPLOYEE ON ISSUE_RECEIPT.Owner_Emp = EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_ID INNER JOIN (select ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ISSUE_RECEIPT_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_FEATURE_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.WAREHOUSE_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.UNIT_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.BIN_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_LOT_ID , SUM(ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ISSUE_RECEIPT_QTY) AS applyQty , SUM(ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ISSUE_RECEIPT_QTY) AS sourceDocQty from ISSUE_RECEIPT_D group by ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ISSUE_RECEIPT_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_FEATURE_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.WAREHOUSE_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.UNIT_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.BIN_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_LOT_ID) AS ISSUE_RECEIPT_D ON ISSUE_RECEIPT.ISSUE_RECEIPT_ID = ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ISSUE_RECEIPT_ID
INNER JOIN ITEM AS ITEM ON ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_ID = ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ITEM_FEATURE AS ITEM_FEATURE ON ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_FEATURE_ID = ITEM_FEATURE.ITEM_FEATURE_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN WAREHOUSE AS WAREHOUSE ON ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.WAREHOUSE_ID = WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID INNER JOIN UNIT AS UNIT ON ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.UNIT_ID = UNIT.UNIT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN BIN ON ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.BIN_ID = BIN.BIN_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ITEM_LOT ON ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_LOT_ID = ITEM_LOT.ITEM_LOT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_FEATURE_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.WAREHOUSE_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BIN_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_LOT_ID , SUM(ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.INVENTORY_QTY) AS TOTAL_INVENTORY_QTY , SUM(ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.SECOND_QTY) AS TOTAL_SECOND_QTY FROM ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN AS ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN INNER JOIN PLANT ON ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.Owner_Org_ROid = PLANT.PLANT_ID INNER JOIN WAREHOUSE ON ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.WAREHOUSE_ID = WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID WHERE ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BO_ID_RTK = 'OTHER' AND ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BO_ID_ROid = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000' AND PLANT.PLANT_CODE = '1' GROUP BY ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_FEATURE_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.WAREHOUSE_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BIN_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_LOT_ID) AS ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN ON ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_ID = ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_ID AND ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_FEATURE_ID = ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_FEATURE_ID AND (ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.WAREHOUSE_ID = ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.WAREHOUSE_ID OR ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.WAREHOUSE_ID = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000') AND (ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BIN_ID = ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.BIN_ID OR ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.BIN_ID = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000') AND (ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_LOT_ID = ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_LOT_ID or ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_LOT_ID = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000') LEFT JOIN UNIT AS UNIT_02 ON ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID = UNIT_02.UNIT_ID LEFT JOIN dbo.UNIT AS UNIT_04 ON ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID = UNIT_04.UNIT_ID WHERE ISSUE_RECEIPT.DOC_NO = #{docNo} AND ISSUE_RECEIPT.ApproveStatus = N'N' GROUP BY ISSUE_RECEIPT.DOC_NO , ISSUE_RECEIPT.DOC_DATE , ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE , ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME , EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_CODE , EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_NAME , ITEM.ITEM_CODE , ITEM_FEATURE.ITEM_FEATURE_CODE , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION , UNIT.UNIT_CODE , WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_CODE , BIN.BIN_CODE , ITEM_LOT.LOT_CODE , UNIT.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT , ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID , UNIT.UNIT_ID , ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID , ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.applyQty , ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.sourceDocQty , UNIT.DICIMAL_DIGIT

SELECT DISTINCT TOP 10 A.DOC_NO AS docNo, CAST(A.DOC_DATE AS NVARCHAR(10)) AS docDate, CAST(A.DOC_DATE AS NVARCHAR(10)) AS createDate, ITEM.ITEM_CODE AS itemCode, A.ITEM_DESCRIPTION AS itemName, ISNULL(A.ITEM_SPECIFICATION, '') AS itemSpec, ISNULL(ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME, '') AS departmentName FROM MO A LEFT JOIN MO_D B ON A.MO_ID = B.MO_ID LEFT JOIN PLANT ON A.Owner_Org_ROid = PLANT.PLANT_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM ON A.ITEM_ID = ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM AS LOW_ITEM ON B.ITEM_ID = LOW_ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN ADMIN_UNIT ON A.Owner_Dept = ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_ID LEFT JOIN WORK_CENTER WC ON A.SOURCE_ID_ROid = WC.WORK_CENTER_ID WHERE A.ApproveStatus = 'Y' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ISSUE_RECEIPT_D IRD INNER JOIN ISSUE_RECEIPT IR ON IR.ISSUE_RECEIPT_ID = IRD.ISSUE_RECEIPT_ID AND IR.CATEGORY = N'56' WHERE IRD.MO_ID = A.MO_ID AND IR.ApproveStatus = N'Y' AND IRD.ISSUE_RECEIPT_QTY > 0 )
AND PLANT.PLANT_CODE = #{plantCode}
AND A.DOC_NO LIKE concat(#{docType}, '%')
AND (WC.WORK_CENTER_CODE LIKE concat('%', #{workCenter}, '%') OR WC.WORK_CENTER_NAME LIKE concat('%', #{workCenter}, '%'))
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM SN_ITEM_RECORD SIR WHERE SIR.SN_NO = #{frameNo} AND (SIR.SOURCE_ID_ROid = A.MO_ID OR SIR.UDF051 = A.MO_ID) )
AND A.DOC_NO LIKE concat('%',#{docNo},'%')
AND ( ITEM.ITEM_CODE LIKE concat('%',#{item},'%') OR A.ITEM_DESCRIPTION LIKE concat('%',#{item},'%') OR LOW_ITEM.ITEM_CODE LIKE concat('%',#{item},'%') OR B.ITEM_DESCRIPTION LIKE concat('%',#{item},'%') )
ORDER BY docDate DESC, docNo ASC

SELECT DISTINCT TOP 10 A.DOC_NO AS docNo, A.DOC_DATE AS docDate, CAST(A.DOC_DATE AS NVARCHAR(10)) AS createDate, ISNULL(B.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE, N' ') AS departmentNo, ISNULL(B.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME, N' ') AS departmentName, ISNULL(C.EMPLOYEE_CODE, N' ') AS employeeNo, ISNULL(C.EMPLOYEE_NAME, N' ') AS employeeName, '' AS customerNo, '' AS customerName, '' AS supplierNo, '' AS supplierName FROM ISSUE_RECEIPT AS A INNER JOIN ISSUE_RECEIPT_D AS D ON A.ISSUE_RECEIPT_ID = D.ISSUE_RECEIPT_ID INNER JOIN PLANT ON A.Owner_Org_ROid = PLANT.PLANT_ID LEFT JOIN ADMIN_UNIT AS B ON A.Owner_Dept = B.ADMIN_UNIT_ID LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE AS C ON A.Owner_Emp = C.EMPLOYEE_ID INNER JOIN ITEM ON D.ITEM_ID = ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID WHERE PLANT.PLANT_CODE = '1' AND A.ApproveStatus = N'N' AND A.CATEGORY = N'57'
and A.DOC_NO like concat('%',#{docNo},'%')
and (B.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE like concat('%',#{department},'%') or B.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME like concat('%',#{department},'%'))
and (C.EMPLOYEE_CODE like concat('%',#{employee},'%') or C.EMPLOYEE_NAME like concat('%',#{employee},'%'))
AND A.DOC_DATE >= concat(#{startDate},' 00:00:00.0000000')
AND A.DOC_DATE <= concat(#{endDate},' 00:00:00.0000000')
ORDER BY A.DOC_DATE DESC, A.DOC_NO ASC

SELECT ISSUE_RECEIPT.DOC_NO AS docNo, CAST(ISSUE_RECEIPT.DOC_DATE AS NVARCHAR(10)) AS docDate, ISNULL(ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE, N' ') AS departmentNo, ISNULL(ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME, N' ') AS departmentName, ISNULL(EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_CODE, N' ') AS employeeNo, ISNULL(EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_NAME, N' ') AS employeeName, ITEM.ITEM_CODE AS itemCode, ISNULL(ITEM_FEATURE.ITEM_FEATURE_CODE, N' ') AS productCode, '' AS stockCode, ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION AS itemName, ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION AS itemSpec, UNIT.UNIT_CODE AS unitCode, 0 AS stockQty, SUM(ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ISSUE_RECEIPT_QTY) AS applyQty, 0 AS scanSumQty, '' AS customerNo, '' AS customerName, '' AS supplierNo, '' AS supplierName, ISNULL(WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_CODE, N' ') AS warehouseCode, ISNULL(WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_NAME, N' ') AS warehouseName, ISNULL(BIN.BIN_CODE, N' ') AS binCode, ISNULL(ITEM_LOT.LOT_CODE, N' ') AS lotNo, UNIT.UNIT_NAME AS unitName, -- 交易单位名称 ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE, '') AS referenceUnitNo, -- 参考单位编码(第二单位) ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME, '') AS referenceUnitName, -- 参考单位名称 ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.SequenceNumber as xh, dbo.UNIT_CONVERT( ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, SUM(ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ISSUE_RECEIPT_QTY), ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID, 0 ) AS referenceQty, -- 参考单位数量 '' AS valuationUnitNo, -- 计价单位编码 '' AS valuationUnitName, -- 计价单位名称 0 AS valuationQty, -- 计价单位数量 UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE AS stockUnitNo, -- 库存单位编码 UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME AS stockUnitName, -- 库存单位名称 UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT AS stockKeep, -- 库存单位小数位数 dbo.UNIT_CONVERT(ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID,UNIT.UNIT_ID,SUM(ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ISSUE_RECEIPT_QTY),ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID,0) AS stockUnitQty, -- 库存单位数量 SUM(ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ISSUE_RECEIPT_QTY) AS sourceDocQty, 0 keep, 1 rate FROM ISSUE_RECEIPT AS ISSUE_RECEIPT INNER JOIN ISSUE_RECEIPT_D AS ISSUE_RECEIPT_D ON ISSUE_RECEIPT.ISSUE_RECEIPT_ID = ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ISSUE_RECEIPT_ID INNER JOIN ITEM AS ITEM ON ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_ID = ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ITEM_FEATURE AS ITEM_FEATURE ON ITEM_FEATURE.ITEM_FEATURE_ID = ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_FEATURE_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ADMIN_UNIT AS ADMIN_UNIT ON ISSUE_RECEIPT.Owner_Dept = ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN EMPLOYEE AS EMPLOYEE ON ISSUE_RECEIPT.Owner_Emp = EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN WAREHOUSE AS WAREHOUSE ON ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.WAREHOUSE_ID = WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID INNER JOIN UNIT AS UNIT ON ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.UNIT_ID = UNIT.UNIT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN BIN ON ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.BIN_ID = BIN.BIN_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ITEM_LOT ON ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_LOT_ID = ITEM_LOT.ITEM_LOT_ID LEFT JOIN UNIT AS UNIT_02 -- 第二单位(参考单位) ON ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID = UNIT_02.UNIT_ID LEFT JOIN dbo.UNIT AS UNIT_04 -- 库存单位 ON ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID = UNIT_04.UNIT_ID WHERE ISSUE_RECEIPT.DOC_NO like concat('%',#{docNo},'%') AND ISSUE_RECEIPT.ApproveStatus = N'N' AND ISSUE_RECEIPT.CATEGORY = N'57'
GROUP BY ISSUE_RECEIPT.DOC_NO, ISSUE_RECEIPT.DOC_DATE, ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE, ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME, EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_CODE, EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_NAME, ITEM.ITEM_CODE, ITEM_FEATURE.ITEM_FEATURE_CODE, ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION, ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION, UNIT.UNIT_CODE, WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_CODE, WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_NAME, BIN.BIN_CODE, ITEM_LOT.LOT_CODE, UNIT.UNIT_NAME, UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE, UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME, UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE, UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME, UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT, ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID, ISSUE_RECEIPT_D.SequenceNumber

SELECT WA.WAREHOUSE_CODE FROM MO_RECEIPT_REQUISTION M LEFT JOIN MO_RECEIPT_REQUISTION_D MD ON MD.MO_RECEIPT_REQUISTION_ID = M.MO_RECEIPT_REQUISTION_ID LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE WA ON MD.WAREHOUSE_ID = WA.WAREHOUSE_ID WHERE DOC_NO =#{docNo}

SELECT DISTINCT TOP 10 A.DOC_NO AS docNo, CAST(A.DOC_DATE AS NVARCHAR(10))AS docDate, ISNULL(E.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE,N'')AS departmentNo, ISNULL(E.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME,N'')AS departmentName, ISNULL(F.EMPLOYEE_CODE,N'')AS employeeNo, ISNULL(F.EMPLOYEE_NAME,N'')AS employeeName, '' AS customerNo,'' AS customerName,'' AS supplierNo,'' AS supplierName FROM MO_RECEIPT_REQUISTION AS A INNER JOIN MO_RECEIPT_REQUISTION_D AS B ON B.MO_RECEIPT_REQUISTION_ID=A.MO_RECEIPT_REQUISTION_ID INNER JOIN PLANT ON A.Owner_Org_ROid=PLANT.PLANT_ID INNER JOIN MO ON B.MO_ID=MO.MO_ID LEFT JOIN ADMIN_UNIT AS E ON A.Owner_Dept=E.ADMIN_UNIT_ID LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE AS F ON A.Owner_Emp=F.EMPLOYEE_ID INNER JOIN ITEM ON B.ITEM_ID=ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID WHERE PLANT.PLANT_CODE='1' AND A.ApproveStatus=N'Y' AND A.[CLOSE]=N'0' AND B.ACCEPTED_QTY+B.CONCESSION_QTY-B.RECEIPT_QTY >0
AND (E.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME LIKE concat('%',#{department},'%') OR E.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE LIKE concat('%',#{department},'%'))
AND (F.EMPLOYEE_CODE LIKE concat('%',#{applyEmployee},'%') OR F.EMPLOYEE_NAME LIKE concat('%',#{applyEmployee},'%'))
AND A.DOC_DATE >= #{startDate}
AND A.DOC_DATE <= #{endDate}
AND ITEM.ITEM_CODE like concat('%', LEFT(#{barCode}, CHARINDEX('#', #{barCode}) - 1), '%')
ORDER BY docDate DESC, A.DOC_NO ASC, departmentNo, departmentName, employeeNo, employeeName

SELECT A.MO_INSPECTION_ID inspectionUuid, PLANT.PLANT_CODE AS plantCode, DOC.DOC_NAME AS checkName, A.DOC_NO AS checkDocNo, D.DOC_NO AS applyDocNo, ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME AS departmentName, EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_NAME AS employeeName, CONVERT ( VARCHAR ( 10 ), CONVERT ( datetime, A.DOC_DATE ), 120 ) AS createDate, CONVERT ( VARCHAR ( 10 ), CONVERT ( datetime, D.DOC_DATE ), 120 ) AS checkDate, CONVERT ( VARCHAR ( 10 ), CONVERT ( datetime, A.INSPECTION_DUE_DATE ), 120 ) AS checkTerm, ITEM.ITEM_CODE AS itemCode, ITEM.ITEM_NAME AS itemName, ITEM.ITEM_SPECIFICATION AS itemSpec, ITEM_FEATURE.ITEM_FEATURE_ID AS itemFeatureId, ITEM_LOT.LOT_CODE AS lotCode, ITEM_LOT.LOT_DESCRIPTION AS lotDescription, ITEM_LOT.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS effectiveDate, ITEM_LOT.INEFFECTIVE_DATE AS ineffectiveDate, A.INSPECTION_QTY AS inspectionQty, A.STRICTNESS_DEGREE AS strictnessDegree, A.ACCEPTABLE_QTY AS acceptableQty, A.UNQUALIFIED_QTY AS unqualifiedQty, A.DESTROYED_QTY AS destroyedQty, A.DECISION AS decision, A.REINSPECTION AS reinspection, A.RESULT_STATUS AS resultStatus, A.DECISION_DESCRIPTION AS decisionDescription, C.SequenceNumber AS applyDocNoXh, E.DOC_NO AS MoDocNo FROM MO_INSPECTION AS A LEFT JOIN MO_RECEIPT_REQUISTION_D AS C ON C.MO_RECEIPT_REQUISTION_D_ID = A.SOURCE_ID LEFT JOIN MO_RECEIPT_REQUISTION AS D ON D.MO_RECEIPT_REQUISTION_ID = C.MO_RECEIPT_REQUISTION_ID LEFT JOIN MO AS E ON E.MO_ID = C.MO_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM ON ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID = A.ITEM_ID LEFT JOIN UNIT ON UNIT.UNIT_ID = A.INSPECTION_UNIT_ID LEFT JOIN PLANT ON PLANT.PLANT_ID = A.Owner_Org_ROid LEFT JOIN DOC ON DOC.DOC_ID = A.DOC_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM_FEATURE ON ITEM_FEATURE.ITEM_FEATURE_ID = A.ITEM_FEATURE_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM_LOT ON ITEM_LOT.ITEM_LOT_ID = A.ITEM_LOT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ADMIN_UNIT ON ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_ID = A.Owner_Dept LEFT OUTER JOIN EMPLOYEE ON EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_ID = A.Owner_Emp WHERE D.DOC_NO = #{applyDocNo}

SELECT B.SequenceNumber AS sequenceNumber, B.MO_INSPECTION_D_ID AS uuid, B.SEQUENCE AS sequence, INSPECTION_ITEM.INSPECTION_ITEM_CODE AS inspectionItemCode, INSPECTION_ITEM.INSPECTION_ITEM_NAME AS inspectionItemName, INSPECTION_ITEM.ITEM_DESCRIPTION AS inspectionItemDescription, B.DEFECT_CLASS AS defectClass, B.INSPECTION_QTY AS inspectionQty, B.INSPECTION_AC AS inspectionAc, B.INSPECTION_RE AS inspectionRe, B.INSPECTION_QQ AS defectiveQty, DEFECTIVE_REASONS.DESCRIPTION AS defectiveReasonDescription, DEFECTIVE_REASONS.DEFECTIVE_REASONS_ID defectReasonUuid, B.DECISION AS decision, B.IMPACT_RESULT AS impactResult, B.STANDARD_VALUE AS standardValue, B.STANDARD_MAX AS standardMax, B.STANDARD_MIN AS standardMin, B.QC_MAX AS qcMax, B.QC_MIN AS qcMin, B.REMARK AS remark FROM MO_INSPECTION_D B LEFT OUTER JOIN MO_INSPECTION A ON A.MO_INSPECTION_ID = B.MO_INSPECTION_ID LEFT JOIN INSPECTION_ITEM ON INSPECTION_ITEM.INSPECTION_ITEM_ID = B.INSPECTION_ITEM_ID LEFT JOIN DEFECTIVE_REASONS ON DEFECTIVE_REASONS.DEFECTIVE_REASONS_ID = B.DEFECTIVE_REASONS_ID WHERE A.DOC_NO = #{checkDocNo}

SELECT A.SequenceNumber, A.MO_INSPECTION_SD1_ID, A.MEASURED_VALUE, A.DECISION, A.REMARK, A.UDF001, A.UDF022, A.ApproveStatus FROM MO_INSPECTION_SD1 A LEFT JOIN MO_INSPECTION_D B ON B.MO_INSPECTION_D_ID = A.MO_INSPECTION_D_ID LEFT JOIN MO_INSPECTION C ON C.MO_INSPECTION_ID = B.MO_INSPECTION_ID LEFT JOIN MO_RECEIPT_REQUISTION_D D ON D.MO_RECEIPT_REQUISTION_D_ID = C.SOURCE_ID LEFT JOIN MO_RECEIPT_REQUISTION E ON E.MO_RECEIPT_REQUISTION_ID = D.MO_RECEIPT_REQUISTION_ID WHERE C.DOC_NO = #{checkDocNo} AND B.MO_INSPECTION_D_ID = #{uuid}

SELECT A.MO_INSPECTION_ID inspectionUuid, PLANT.PLANT_CODE AS plantCode, DOC.DOC_NAME AS checkName, A.DOC_NO AS checkDocNo, D.DOC_NO AS applyDocNo, ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME AS departmentName, EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_NAME AS employeeName, CONVERT ( VARCHAR ( 10 ), CONVERT ( datetime, A.DOC_DATE ), 120 ) AS createDate, CONVERT ( VARCHAR ( 10 ), CONVERT ( datetime, D.DOC_DATE ), 120 ) AS checkDate, CONVERT ( VARCHAR ( 10 ), CONVERT ( datetime, A.INSPECTION_DUE_DATE ), 120 ) AS checkTerm, ITEM.ITEM_CODE AS itemCode, ITEM.ITEM_NAME AS itemName, ITEM.ITEM_SPECIFICATION AS itemSpec, ITEM_FEATURE.ITEM_FEATURE_ID AS itemFeatureId, ITEM_LOT.LOT_CODE AS lotCode, ITEM_LOT.LOT_DESCRIPTION AS lotDescription, ITEM_LOT.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS effectiveDate, ITEM_LOT.INEFFECTIVE_DATE AS ineffectiveDate, A.INSPECTION_QTY AS inspectionQty, A.STRICTNESS_DEGREE AS strictnessDegree, A.ACCEPTABLE_QTY AS acceptableQty, A.UNQUALIFIED_QTY AS unqualifiedQty, A.DESTROYED_QTY AS destroyedQty, A.DECISION AS decision, A.REINSPECTION AS reinspection, A.RESULT_STATUS AS resultStatus, A.DECISION_DESCRIPTION AS decisionDescription FROM MO_INSPECTION AS A LEFT JOIN MO_RECEIPT_REQUISTION_D AS C ON C.MO_RECEIPT_REQUISTION_D_ID = A.SOURCE_ID LEFT JOIN MO_RECEIPT_REQUISTION AS D ON D.MO_RECEIPT_REQUISTION_ID = C.MO_RECEIPT_REQUISTION_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM ON ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID = A.ITEM_ID LEFT JOIN UNIT ON UNIT.UNIT_ID = A.INSPECTION_UNIT_ID LEFT JOIN PLANT ON PLANT.PLANT_ID = A.Owner_Org_ROid LEFT JOIN DOC ON DOC.DOC_ID = A.DOC_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM_FEATURE ON ITEM_FEATURE.ITEM_FEATURE_ID = A.ITEM_FEATURE_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM_LOT ON ITEM_LOT.ITEM_LOT_ID = A.ITEM_LOT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ADMIN_UNIT ON ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_ID = A.Owner_Dept LEFT OUTER JOIN EMPLOYEE ON EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_ID = A.Owner_Emp
AND A.DOC_NO = #{checkDocNo}

SELECT bm.barcode, bm.source_no AS sourceNo, I.ITEM_CODE AS itemNo, I.ITEM_NAME AS itemName, I.ITEM_SPECIFICATION AS itemSpec, bm.qty, bm.lot_desc AS lotDesc, bm.lot_date AS lotDate, ISNULL(bm.combination_lot_no, '') AS lotNo, ISNULL(W.WAREHOUSE_CODE,'') AS warehouseCode, W.WAREHOUSE_NAME AS warehouseName, ISNULL(IP.UDF021,'') AS binCode, ISNULL(U.UNIT_CODE,'') AS unitNo, U.UNIT_NAME AS unitName, PLANT.PLANT_CODE AS shjg, MO.UDF022 AS customerNo FROM bm_barcode_detail bm LEFT JOIN MO ON bm.source_no COLLATE Chinese_PRC_CS_AS = MO.DOC_NO LEFT JOIN UNIT U ON MO.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID = U.UNIT_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM I ON MO.ITEM_ID = I.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM_PLANT IP ON I.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID = IP.ITEM_ID AND MO.Owner_Org_ROid=IP.Owner_Org_ROid LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE W ON W.WAREHOUSE_ID = IP.INBOUND_WAREHOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN PLANT ON MO.Owner_Org_ROid = PLANT.PLANT_ID WHERE bm.barcode = #{barcode}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM package_issuestorage WHERE barcode = #{barcode}

SELECT DISTINCT B.REQUEST_QTY,B.ISSUE_RECEIPT_QTY, C.WORK_CENTER_CODE workCenterCode, C.WORK_CENTER_NAME workCenterName, A.DOC_NO docNo, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, CAST(A.DOC_DATE AS DATE), 23) docDate, M.DOC_NO modocNo, MI.ITEM_CODE itemCode, CASE WHEN CHARINDEX('-', MI.ITEM_NAME) > 0 THEN LEFT(MI.ITEM_NAME, CHARINDEX('-', MI.ITEM_NAME) - 1) ELSE MI.ITEM_NAME END AS itemName, MI.ITEM_SPECIFICATION itemNSpec, MOCTA.TA033 customerNo, W.WAREHOUSE_NAME warehouseName, W.WAREHOUSE_CODE warehouseCode FROM ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ A LEFT JOIN ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D B ON A.ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_ID= B.ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_ID LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE W ON W.WAREHOUSE_ID =B.WAREHOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN MO M ON M.MO_ID = B.MO_ID LEFT JOIN MOCTA ON M.MO_ID = MOCTA.MO_ID LEFT JOIN WORK_CENTER C ON C.WORK_CENTER_ID= A.SOURCE_ID_ROid LEFT JOIN ITEM MI ON MI.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID= M.ITEM_ID WHERE B.REQUEST_QTY != B.ISSUE_RECEIPT_QTY AND A.[CLOSE] = '0'
AND MOCTA.TA033 LIKE '%' + #{customerNo} + '%'
AND A.DOC_DATE >= CONVERT(DATE, #{beginTime})
AND A.DOC_DATE <= CONVERT(DATE, #{endTime})
AND W.WAREHOUSE_NAME like '%' + #{warehouseName} + '%'
AND W.WAREHOUSE_CODE IN
#{warehouseCode}
ORDER BY CONVERT(NVARCHAR, CAST(A.DOC_DATE AS DATE), 23) DESC

SELECT barcode,item_no itemCode,item_name itemName,item_spec itemSpec,unit_no unitNo,unit_name unitName, qty,sn_warehouse_no warehouseCode,sn_cell_no binCode,remark,org_no shjg,combination_lot_no lotCode FROM bm_barcode_detail WHERE barcode = #{barCode}

SELECT id, item_code itemCode, business_qty businessQty, item_name itemName, item_spec itemSpec, create_by createBy, create_time createTime, match_qty matchQty, doc_no docNo, unit_no unitNo,bin_code binCode, warehouse_code warehouseCode, barcode barCode, shjg FROM picking_summary WHERE create_by = #{createBy} ORDER BY item_code

SELECT DISTINCT C.WAREHOUSE_CODE warehouseCode,C.WAREHOUSE_NAME warehouseName FROM ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ A LEFT JOIN ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_D B ON A.ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_ID=B.ISSUE_RECEIPT_REQ_ID LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE C ON C.WAREHOUSE_ID =B.WAREHOUSE_ID WHERE B.REQUEST_QTY-B.ISSUE_RECEIPT_QTY>0 AND A.DOC_NO IN
#{docNo}

SELECT id, item_code itemCode, business_qty requestQty, item_name itemName, item_spec itemSpec, create_by createBy, create_time createTime, match_qty issueReceiptQty, doc_no docNo, unit_no unitCode,unit_name unitName,bin_code binCode, warehouse_code warehouseCode, barcode barCode, customerNo,shjg, currect_num currectNum FROM picking_summary WHERE create_by = #{createBy} -- AND match_qty != 0
SELECT count(1) FROM inv_barcode_operation WHERE create_by = #{createBy} AND status_code = 0 AND chag_type = 1
SELECT SUM(qty) FROM inv_barcode_operation WHERE barcode = #{barcode} AND create_by = #{createBy} AND chag_type = 1

SELECT id,warehouse_no warehouseNo, cell_no cellNo, item_no itemNo, item_name itemName, item_spec itemSpec, barcode, qty, unit_no unitNo, chag_type chagType, status_code statusCode, create_by createBy,create_date createDate FROM inv_barcode_operation WHERE create_by = #{createBy} AND status_code = 0 AND chag_type = 1 ORDER BY item_no

SELECT MO.DOC_NO AS docNo, I.ITEM_CODE itemCode, U.UNIT_CODE unitCode, ISNULL(W.WAREHOUSE_CODE,'') warehouseCode, ISNULL(B.BIN_CODE,'') binCode, MO.SCRAP_QTY scrapQty, MO.DESTROYED_QTY rejectQty, MO.PLAN_QTY matchQty, ( SELECT barcode FROM bm_barcode_detail WHERE barcode = #{barcode} ) AS barcode, ISNULL(MO.REMARK,'')AS remark, PLANT.PLANT_CODE AS shjg FROM MO LEFT JOIN UNIT U ON MO.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID = U.UNIT_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM I ON MO.ITEM_ID = I.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM_PLANT IP ON I.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID = IP.ITEM_ID AND MO.Owner_Org_ROid= IP.Owner_Org_ROid LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE W ON W.WAREHOUSE_ID = IP.INBOUND_WAREHOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN BIN B ON B.BIN_ID = IP.INBOUND_BIN_ID LEFT JOIN PLANT ON MO.Owner_Org_ROid = PLANT.PLANT_ID
WHERE MO.DOC_NO IN (SELECT DOC_NO docNo FROM SN_ITEM_RECORD LEFT JOIN MO ON SN_ITEM_RECORD.SOURCE_ID_ROid = MO_ID WHERE SN_NO = #{barcode})

SELECT A.warehouseCode FROM WMS..warehouseStaff A LEFT JOIN [USER] B ON B.USER_NAME = A.employeeName LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE W ON A.warehouseCode = W.WAREHOUSE_CODE WHERE LOGONNAME = #{employeeNo} AND type = 'CG'

SELECT SUM(INVENTORY_QTY) AS inventoryQty,W.WAREHOUSE_CODE AS warehouseCode FROM ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN IWB LEFT JOIN ITEM I ON I.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID = IWB.ITEM_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM_LOT IL ON IL.ITEM_LOT_ID = IWB.ITEM_LOT_ID LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE W ON IWB.WAREHOUSE_ID = W.WAREHOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN PLANT P ON P.PLANT_ID = IWB.Owner_Org_ROid WHERE I.ITEM_CODE = #{itemCode} AND IL.LOT_CODE = #{lotNumber} AND P.PLANT_CODE = #{shjg} AND W.WAREHOUSE_CODE = #{warehouseCode} GROUP BY W.WAREHOUSE_CODE

SELECT B.DOC_NO docNo, TA017 warehousing,(TA015-TA017) toBePutIntoStorage FROM SN_ITEM_RECORD A LEFT JOIN MO B ON A.SOURCE_ID_ROid=B.MO_ID LEFT JOIN MOCTA ON CONCAT(RTRIM(TA001), '-', RTRIM(TA002)) = B.DOC_NO WHERE SN_NO = #{barcode}

SELECT SUM(INVENTORY_QTY) FROM ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN A LEFT JOIN ITEM C ON C.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID=A.ITEM_ID LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE B ON A.WAREHOUSE_ID=B.WAREHOUSE_ID WHERE C.ITEM_CODE = #{itemCode} AND B.WAREHOUSE_CODE NOT IN ('2017','1011','1012','2018')

SELECT id, item_code itemCode, business_qty businessQty, item_name itemName, item_spec itemSpec, create_by createBy, create_time createTime, match_qty matchQty, doc_no docNo, unit_no unitCode,unit_name unitName,bin_code binCode, warehouse_code warehouseCode, barcode barCode, customerNo,shjg, currect_num currectNum FROM picking_summary WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, item_code itemCode, business_qty businessQty, item_name itemName, item_spec itemSpec, create_by createBy, create_time createTime, match_qty matchQty, doc_no docNo, unit_no unitCode,unit_name unitName,bin_code binCode, warehouse_code warehouseCode, barcode barCode, customerNo,shjg, currect_num currectNum FROM picking_summary WHERE create_by = #{createBy} AND item_code = #{itemNo}

SELECT B.DOC_NO docNo, (B.PLAN_QTY-B.COMPLETED_QTY) AS toBePutIntoStorage, B.COMPLETED_QTY AS warehousing FROM MO B WHERE B.DOC_NO = ( SELECT ( SELECT TOP 1 C.DOC_NO FROM MO C LEFT JOIN MO_D D ON C.MO_ID=D.MO_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM ON ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID = C.ITEM_ID WHERE D.ITEM_ID=B.ITEM_ID AND C.UDF021=B.UDF021 AND ITEM_CODE LIKE '1%' AND C.DOC_NO LIKE CONCAT(RTRIM(TA001), '%')) docNo FROM SN_ITEM_RECORD A LEFT JOIN MO B ON A.SOURCE_ID_ROid=B.MO_ID LEFT JOIN MOCTA ON CONCAT(RTRIM(TA001), '-', RTRIM(TA002)) = B.DOC_NO WHERE SN_NO = #{barcode} )
SELECT SN_NO FROM SN_ITEM_RECORD WHERE SOURCE_ID_ROid = (SELECT SOURCE_ID_ROid FROM SN_ITEM_RECORD WHERE SN_NO = #{barcode}) AND EXISTS(SELECT * FROM package_issuestorage WHERE barcode = SN_NO)
SELECT SN_NO FROM SN_ITEM_RECORD WHERE SOURCE_ID_ROid = (SELECT SOURCE_ID_ROid FROM SN_ITEM_RECORD WHERE SN_NO = #{barcode}) AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM package_issuestorage WHERE barcode = SN_NO)

SELECT bm.barcode, bm.source_no AS sourceNo, bm.item_no AS itemNo, bm.item_name AS itemName, bm.item_spec AS itemSpec, bm.lot_att30 AS lotAtt30, bm.qty, bm.lot_desc AS lotDesc, bm.lot_date AS lotDate, W.WAREHOUSE_CODE AS warehouseCode, W.WAREHOUSE_NAME AS warehouseName, B.BIN_CODE AS binCode, U.UNIT_CODE AS unitNo, U.UNIT_NAME AS unitName, PLANT.PLANT_CODE AS shjg FROM bm_barcode_detail bm LEFT JOIN MO ON bm.source_no COLLATE Chinese_PRC_CS_AS = MO.DOC_NO LEFT JOIN UNIT U ON MO.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID = U.UNIT_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM I ON MO.ITEM_ID = I.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM_PLANT IP ON I.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID = IP.ITEM_ID AND MO.Owner_Org_ROid=IP.Owner_Org_ROid LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE W ON W.WAREHOUSE_ID = IP.INBOUND_WAREHOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN BIN B ON B.BIN_ID = IP.INBOUND_BIN_ID LEFT JOIN PLANT ON MO.Owner_Org_ROid = PLANT.PLANT_ID
AND barcode = #{barcode}
SELECT TOP 1 ISNULL(A.UDF021, 'NO') FROM ITEM_PLANT A LEFT JOIN ITEM B ON A.ITEM_ID=B.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID WHERE B.ITEM_CODE = #{itemNo}

SELECT lot_att30,barcode,item_no itemCode,item_name itemName,item_spec itemSpec, unit_no unitNo,unit_name unitName, qty,sn_warehouse_no warehouseCode, sn_cell_no binCode,remark,org_no shjg,combination_lot_no lotCode, customer_no customerNo,source_no sourceNo FROM bm_barcode_detail WHERE (lot_att30 NOT IN ('5') OR lot_att30 IS NULL) AND barcode = #{barcode}

SELECT B.DOC_NO docNo,C.ITEM_CODE itemCode,A.PRODUCT_TYPE productType,A.PLAN_QTY planQty, U.UNIT_CODE unitCode, W.WAREHOUSE_CODE warehouseCode FROM MO_PRODUCT A LEFT JOIN MO B ON B.MO_ID = A.MO_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM C ON A.ITEM_ID = C.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM_PLANT D ON C.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID = D.ITEM_ID AND D.Owner_Org_ROid = B.Owner_Org_ROid LEFT JOIN UNIT U ON A.UNIT_ID = U.UNIT_ID LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE W ON W.WAREHOUSE_ID = A.WAREHOUSE_ID WHERE B.DOC_NO IN
#{item}

SELECT MO.DOC_NO AS docNo, I.ITEM_CODE AS itemCode, U.UNIT_CODE AS unitCode, ISNULL(W.WAREHOUSE_CODE,'') AS warehouseCode, ISNULL(B.BIN_CODE,'') AS binCode, MO.SCRAP_QTY AS scrapQty, MO.DESTROYED_QTY AS rejectQty, MO.PLAN_QTY AS matchQty, SNR.SN_NO AS barcode, ISNULL(MO.REMARK,'') AS remark, PLANT.PLANT_CODE AS shjg FROM SN_ITEM_RECORD SNR JOIN MO ON SNR.SOURCE_ID_ROid = MO.MO_ID LEFT JOIN UNIT U ON MO.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID = U.UNIT_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM I ON MO.ITEM_ID = I.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM_PLANT IP ON I.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID = IP.ITEM_ID AND MO.Owner_Org_ROid = IP.Owner_Org_ROid LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE W ON W.WAREHOUSE_ID = IP.INBOUND_WAREHOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN BIN B ON B.BIN_ID = IP.INBOUND_BIN_ID LEFT JOIN PLANT ON MO.Owner_Org_ROid = PLANT.PLANT_ID WHERE SNR.SN_NO IN
#{id}

SELECT A.[帐号] FROM QYWX A LEFT JOIN [USER] B ON A.[姓名] = B.USER_NAME WHERE B.LOGONNAME IN
#{id}
SELECT F.WORK_CENTER_CODE FROM MO A LEFT JOIN WORK_CENTER F ON A.SOURCE_ID_ROid = F.WORK_CENTER_ID WHERE A.DOC_NO = #{docNo}

SELECT SN_NO FROM SN_ITEM_RECORD WHERE SOURCE_ID_ROid = (SELECT SOURCE_ID_ROid FROM SN_ITEM_RECORD WHERE SN_NO = #{barcode}) AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM package_issuestorage WHERE barcode = SN_NO) AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM FinishedGoodsInboundDetail WHERE barcode = SN_NO)

SELECT lot_att30, barcode, item_no itemCode, item_name itemName, item_spec itemSpec, unit_no unitNo, unit_name unitName, qty, sn_warehouse_no warehouseCode, sn_cell_no binCode, remark, org_no shjg, combination_lot_no lotCode, customer_no customerNo, source_no sourceNo FROM bm_barcode_detail WHERE barcode = #{barcode} AND item_no IN (SELECT DISTINCT ITEM.ITEM_CODE FROM MO LEFT JOIN MO_D ON MO.MO_ID = MO_D.MO_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM ON ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID = MO_D.ITEM_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM_PLANT ON ITEM_PLANT.ITEM_ID = MO_D.ITEM_ID AND ITEM_PLANT.Owner_Org_ROid = MO.Owner_Org_ROid WHERE MO.DOC_NO = #{docNo})

SELECT DISTINCT agv_warehouse.* FROM MOCTY LEFT JOIN MO ON MO.DOC_NO = MOCTY.TY001 + '-' + MOCTY.TY002 LEFT JOIN MO_D ON MO.MO_ID = MO_D.MO_ID LEFT JOIN OPERATION ON OPERATION.OPERATION_ID = MO_D.OPERATION_ID LEFT JOIN agv_process_info ON agv_process_info.processCode = OPERATION.OPERATION_CODE AND MOCTY.TY009 = agv_process_info.productionLine LEFT JOIN agv_warehouse ON agv_warehouse.id = agv_process_info.agvWarId LEFT JOIN ITEM ON ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID = MO_D.ITEM_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM_PLANT ON ITEM_PLANT.ITEM_ID = MO_D.ITEM_ID AND ITEM_PLANT.Owner_Org_ROid = MO.Owner_Org_ROid LEFT JOIN agv_task_detail ON agv_task_detail.itemCode = ITEM.ITEM_CODE WHERE MO.DOC_NO = #{docNo} AND agv_task_detail.barcode = #{barcode}

SELECT MO.DOC_NO docNo,ITEM.ITEM_CODE itemCode,ITEM.ITEM_NAME itemName,ITEM.ITEM_SPECIFICATION itemSpec,MO.UDF021 khdh FROM SN_ITEM_RECORD A LEFT JOIN MO ON A.SOURCE_ID_ROid = MO.MO_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM ON ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID = MO.ITEM_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM_PLANT ON ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID = ITEM_PLANT.ITEM_ID AND MO.Owner_Org_ROid=ITEM_PLANT.Owner_Org_ROid WHERE SN_NO = #{barcode}

SELECT PLANT.PLANT_NAME plantName,DOC.DOC_NAME docName,MO_RECEIPT.DOC_NO docNo,LEFT(MO_RECEIPT.DOC_DATE,10) docDate,WORK_CENTER.WORK_CENTER_NAME workCenterName,MO_RECEIPT.MO_RECEIPT_ID id FROM MO_RECEIPT LEFT JOIN PLANT ON PLANT.PLANT_ID = MO_RECEIPT.Owner_Org_ROid LEFT JOIN DOC ON DOC.DOC_ID = MO_RECEIPT.DOC_ID LEFT JOIN WORK_CENTER ON WORK_CENTER.WORK_CENTER_ID = MO_RECEIPT.SOURCE_ID_ROid WHERE MO_RECEIPT.DOC_ID IN ('4283FE47-F119-4474-2A6A-1943B1C379C5','8E4930AE-EB5E-4F43-51D7-1943BB29D560') AND MO_RECEIPT.ApproveStatus <> 'Y'

SELECT MO.DOC_NO docNo,MO.UDF021 udf021,ITEM.ITEM_CODE itemCode,ITEM.ITEM_NAME itemName,ITEM.ITEM_SPECIFICATION itemSpecification, MO_RECEIPT_D.ACCEPTED_QTY acceptedQty FROM MO_RECEIPT_D LEFT JOIN MO ON MO.MO_ID = MO_RECEIPT_D.MO_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM ON ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID = MO_RECEIPT_D.ITEM_ID WHERE MO_RECEIPT_D.MO_RECEIPT_ID = #{id};
